action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 16 OOM during model loading in transformers caching_allocator_warmup, likely due to auto device placement trying to pre-allocate memory. Analysis: Need to load model on CPU first, apply LoRA, then move to GPU to avoid warmup allocation. Also need to fix DataLoader collation for batch_size=1, and implement proper label masking using chat template assistant section. Decision: Rewrite train.py with CPU loading, correct collate, label masking via find_assistant_tokens, and start full training on 7000 samples, 3 epochs.

Search for `cudaErrorMemoryAllocation' in https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cuda-runtime-api/group__CUDART__TYPES.html for more information.
